prime-suite.name: Prime Suite
prime-suite.description: Elegant suites designed for comfort and style, offering a refined retreat experience.

imperial.name: Imperial
imperial.description: Grand rooms with a commanding presence, blending timeless luxury with modern comforts.

platinum.name: Platinum
platinum.description: Exclusive Platinum rooms represent the pinnacle of sophisticated hotel living.

elite.name: Elite
elite.description: Spacious Elite rooms offering superior amenities and an elevated sense of privacy.

verde-suite.name: Verde Suite
verde-suite.description: Fresh, garden-inspired suites that bring the tranquility of nature indoors.

serenity.name: Serenity
serenity.description: Peaceful rooms crafted for restful stays, wrapped in calming tones and thoughtful design.

room_101.description: A beautifully appointed Prime Suite featuring a plush king bed, warm ambient lighting, and a marble en-suite bathroom. Ideal for couples or solo travellers seeking an intimate luxury experience.

room_102.description: Mirroring the elegance of its neighbour, Room 102 is a Prime Suite offering a serene retreat with premium furnishings and attentive in-room amenities.

room_201.description: A commanding Imperial room with high ceilings, bespoke furniture, and sweeping city views. Every detail speaks to grandeur and refined taste.

room_301.description: Positioned on the third floor, Room 301 is an Imperial retreat offering panoramic views, an expansive lounge area, and exclusive butler service.

room_211.description: The Platinum experience — sophisticated interiors, curated artwork, and world-class amenities make Room 211 one of the hotel's most coveted accommodations.

room_311.description: Room 311 is a Platinum-class haven featuring a private terrace, bespoke decor, and the finest bed linen available, ensuring an unrivalled rest.

room_204.description: An Elite room designed for the discerning guest — generous space, top-tier technology, and luxurious bathroom fittings combine for an exceptional stay.

room_304.description: Room 304 Elite combines elevated comfort with thoughtful design, featuring premium amenities and a peaceful ambiance ideal for business and leisure alike.

room_203.description: A Verde Suite immersed in lush garden tones and natural textures, offering a private balcony overlooking the hotel's tropical grounds.

room_205.description: Room 205 Verde Suite offers a calming green sanctuary with garden-facing windows, natural décor accents, and a spacious en-suite.

room_207.description: Nestled in a quiet corner of the second floor, Room 207 is a Verde Suite with a serene balcony perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation.

room_303.description: Third-floor Verde Suite with elevated garden views, bright interiors, and a refined balcony space for an outdoor retreat.

room_305.description: Room 305 Verde Suite — a lush, restful escape with panoramic garden views, artisan furnishings, and a rejuvenating rain shower.

room_307.description: Tucked on the third floor with a tranquil garden aspect, Room 307 Verde Suite offers a nature-inspired retreat in the heart of the hotel.

room_202.description: A Serenity room designed for total relaxation — softly lit, immaculately furnished, and wrapped in a palette of soothing neutrals.

room_206.description: Room 206 is a Serenity haven offering a peaceful escape from the city, with carefully chosen furnishings and a restful ambiance.

room_208.description: Quiet and beautifully appointed, Room 208 Serenity offers a cocoon of calm for guests who value rest above all else.

room_209.description: At the end of the second-floor corridor, Room 209 Serenity benefits from exceptional quiet, tasteful décor, and premium sleep amenities.

room_302.description: Third-floor Serenity room with elevated views and a calm interior. A perfect base for a restorative stay in Abuja.

room_306.description: Room 306 Serenity is a light-filled retreat on the third floor, combining understated luxury with the quiet calm of a true sanctuary.

room_308.description: A spacious Serenity room near the staircase terrace, Room 308 offers exceptional comfort with plush bedding and serene décor.

room_309.description: The last room on the third floor, Room 309 Serenity is a tranquil retreat with soft furnishings, excellent natural light, and superior sound insulation.
